ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot carefully inspecting items, mimicking the customs inspection process.  The sequence will focus on the robot's arms performing a deliberate, methodical check of a hypothetical package.  The left arm will remain mostly still, providing a stable base of support and contrast to the right arm's movements. The right arm will actively engage in the inspection process.  We'll leverage the two-joint system, ensuring smooth transitions between frames. Frame 1: Both arms start in a neutral, relaxed position.  Frame 2: The right arm extends forward and slightly upward, as if reaching for a package or container. The wrist rotates slightly to simulate careful handling. Frame 3: The right arm moves down and a little back, as if inspecting the package's sides or bottom.  Frame 4: The right arm returns to a neutral position, indicating the inspection is complete. Frame 5: The right arm moves slightly outward and upward as if placing the item aside. The left arm will remain largely still throughout the animation, providing a grounded and stable counterpoint to the active right arm.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready for inspection
right arm reaches out, ready to examine
the right arm carefully probes the item
inspection complete, right arm returns to neutral
right arm sets the item aside, motion finished
